findings.message: Firmware state machine 'ddr5_init' is missing 12 protocol-defined state(s): ['DDR5_STATE_CA_TRAIN', 'DDR5_STATE_CKE_HIGH', 'DDR5_STATE_CRC_CONFIG', 'DDR5_STATE_DCA_TRAIN', 'DDR5_STATE_DQ_TRAIN', 'DDR5_STATE_ERROR', 'DDR5_STATE_MR_CONFIG', 'DDR5_STATE_MR_VERIFY', 'DDR5_STATE_READY', 'DDR5_STATE_RESET', 'DDR5_STATE_VREF_TRAIN', 'DDR5_STATE_ZQ_CALIB']

findings.message: Function 'ddr5_train_vref_dq' writes MR6 Vref DQ value. Spec limits VREF_DQ_VAL to 127 (7-bit), but training function may return 0-255. Values >127 will be silently truncated.
findings.actual: Training function returns uint8_t (0-255), masked to 7-bit

findings.message: Function 'ddr5_train_vref_ca' writes MR6 Vref DQ value. Spec limits VREF_DQ_VAL to 127 (7-bit), but training function may return 0-255. Values >127 will be silently truncated.
findings.actual: Training function returns uint8_t (0-255), masked to 7-bit

findings.message: Function '_state_vref_train' writes MR6 Vref DQ value. Spec limits VREF_DQ_VAL to 127 (7-bit), but training function may return 0-255. Values >127 will be silently truncated.
findings.actual: Training function returns uint8_t (0-255), masked to 7-bit

findings.message: DDR5 ERROR state has no outgoing transitions — it is a dead-end state with no recovery path.
findings.expected: ERROR state has recovery path (retry or graceful degradation)
findings.actual: ERROR state is terminal (no outgoing transitions)

findings.message: Register dependency detected: MR5_DFE_EN depends on MR3 CRC configuration state. Verify configuration order in '_state_mr_config'.
findings.actual: Static check — manual code review recommended for '_state_mr_config'
